ItacPersonItem.Notes: He published Licandro tragicomedia pastorale di Girolamo della Manna Accademico Humorista, e Fantastico di Roma, Otioso di Napoli, e Riacceso di Palermo (Rome, Mascardi, 1634), preceded by sonnets of fellow Umoristi in praise of Manna`s work For a short reference to della Manna`s affiliation to Sicilian academies see A. F. Ferrara, Storia generale della Sicilia, Vol. VI, Palermo, 1833, p. 293
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
